title: Stats+
description: Track more Stats with Stats+ better then the Normal Stats.
body:
### 📊 Stats+

Stats+ is a Fabric mod for Minecraft 1.21.10 that tracks advanced player statistics beyond vanilla Minecraft.

It records how players mine, craft, fight, explore, and play, and displays the data using in-game GUIs and a built-in web interface with live leaderboards and personal stat pages.

Designed to be lightweight and server-friendly, Stats+ uses SQLite for storage and saves statistics in optimized batches to avoid performance issues.

**✨ Features**

Advanced player statistics tracking

Per-block and per-item statistics

In-game stats GUI

In-game leaderboard GUI

Built-in web interface for stats and leaderboards

SQLite storage (no external database required)

Optimized batch saving for high performance

Extensible stat system for future expansion

**🧾 Commands**

/stats – Opens your personal statistics GUI

/stats web – Displays the web interface address

**🌐 Web Interface**

View global leaderboards and detailed player statistics directly in your browser, without needing server access.

⚙️ Requirements

Minecraft 1.21.10

Fabric Loader

Java 21

**🎯 Perfect For**

SMP servers

Competitive servers

Public servers with leaderboards

Admins who want deeper analytics than vanilla stats
